Our Story

Growth Journal

The real story of how Basil Metrics was built — from scaling Bangkok's largest bakery brand to a full-service performance marketing team.

Early 2026

New Service

TikTok Shop & Automated Booking

Officially expanded our service stack to include TikTok Shop management and automated booking system integration. While our roots run deep in F&B and retail, we are currently expanding our portfolio and taking on new types of clients who share our ambitious, growth-focused mindset.

Early 2026

Team Update

A Full-Service Team

Expanded into a highly focused team of five. This allows us to fully support our partners across every digital touchpoint — branding consultation, visual content creation, full-stack campaign management, and targeted food delivery ads on Grab and LINE MAN.

Late 2025

Platform Update

Embracing AI

Integrated advanced AI tools into our daily workflows. We believe in continuous learning, and adapting to this technology allows us to work smarter, maintain our deep attention to detail, and provide even more efficient support to the brands we care about.

Late 2023

Milestone

Officially Open

Began onboarding new F&B and retail partners. After years of testing and scaling our own brand from the ground up, we felt ready to step out and share our hands-on strategies with other ambitious founders who share our dedication.

Mid 2023

Milestone

The Expansion

Expanded our services beyond our immediate network to partner with small, ambitious brands. We wanted to take the hands-on strategies we learned from our own growth and help other passionate F&B and retail founders scale their businesses.

Early 2020

Milestone

The Foundation

Spearheaded full-stack marketing for a local startup, scaling it into Bangkok's largest bakery brand. This intensive, ground-up growth experience forged our signature approach: combining high-level scaling strategies with sincere, full-time attention to detail.

BasilMetrics

Performance marketing for Bangkok's most ambitious food and F&B brands. Strategy, creative, and paid media — built to convert.
